anomalies.title: Volume spike detected
anomalies.descriptionTemplate: {institution} submitted >200% above baseline. Review batch for quarantine.

anomalies.title: Schema mapping change
anomalies.description: Unrecognized segment detected in submission payload. Review mapping coverage.
